name: @platform/observability
description: Observability abstraction: structured logging, metrics emission, distributed tracing spans, and health check interface.

readme.summary: Observability abstraction: structured logging, metrics emission, distributed tracing spans, and health check interface.
responsibilities: Define the canonical structured logger, metrics emitter, and tracer interfaces
Provide a health check registration interface for runtime processes
Decouple all platform packages from specific observability vendors
Serve as the single import point for logs, metrics, and traces across the platform
nonResponsibilities: Does not implement a specific observability backend (owned by adapters-sentry, adapters-opentelemetry)
Does not own alerting rules or dashboards
Does not collect business metrics — only platform-level signals
usage: Imported by all runtime and adapter packages needing logs, metrics, or traces
Concrete adapters (adapters-opentelemetry, adapters-sentry) implement the interfaces defined here
operationalNotes: Replace the no-op default implementations with concrete adapters before deploying to staging or production
All structured log fields must follow the platform log schema to ensure queryability
